questions.q: A report published on April 15, 2026, about AI-written books flooding the market, noted the 2025 class-action settlement known as 'Bartz v.' which artificial intelligence company?

Which multiplayer pirate survival game announced it sold 500,000 copies just 48 hours after launching into Early Access in April 2026?
Aaron Taylor-Johnson stars in the newly-teased horror movie 'Werwulf', which is directed by which filmmaker known for 'The Witch' and 'The Northman'?
What is the title of Steven Spielberg's upcoming UFO movie, which debuted its first trailer during Universal's presentation at CinemaCon 2026?
In April 2026, the FDA announced it will convene a panel to weigh easing limits on what unapproved therapies promoted by RFK Jr.?
What type of records is Tiger Woods fighting a subpoena for, according to news breaking on April 16, 2026?

options: Fight him in the parking lot

questions.q: On April 15, 2026, Spotify expanded its features by launching the ability to purchase physical books in the US and UK. Which platform is powering this new feature?
